signal_evidence.consumer_stress_tier: We believe our new collections reflect a level of design and quality inaccessible in our current market and a value proposition that will be disruptive across multiple markets — context: management explicitly acknowledges prior pricing was too high ('we were arrogant looking back') and is deliberately repositioning price points downward to recapture demand from a stressed luxury housing customer base
signal_evidence.capex_direction: Our plan to open immersive Design Galleries in every major market... we continue to plan opening RH Indianapolis and RH Cleveland in the second half of this year — international and domestic gallery pipeline is active but no step-change in capital intensity disclosed; new design studios are low-capital-intensity format
signal_evidence.pricing_power: I think we probably were a bit arrogant looking back... we're going to be very aggressive [on pricing]... we're going to use the size and strength of our platform and the leverage it gives us to be disruptive from a pricing point of view
signal_evidence.management_tone_shift: I think we've never been more excited about the future... we've set up better than we've ever been set up in the history of the business... I think we'll have the biggest inflection point we've ever had
